backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Journey, LocationInfo, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, etc.) and stable state maps for a travel/map application backend on the Internet Computer. Integrates blob storage, access control, and registry mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that TraveloguePanel.tsx and useQueries.ts implement filtering of schedule items by journey unique ID so each journey displays only its own travelogue entries.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and recent changes of each component, hook, and page in the application.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, loading SunCalc via CDN and mounting the app into a div with id 'root'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app with ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and QueryClientProvider, and renders LocationMapExplorer, BackendDebugger, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel dialog with tabbed sections for managing journeys, schedule items, locations, albums, travel spots, music, geo data, and layout settings; uses journeyKey-based schedule hooks for per-journey travelogue isolation.
Utility component that exposes the backend actor as window.backend and logs debugging instructions (role check, admin promotion, admin list) to the browser console on mount.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: Component for managing a city's media album, supporting file uploads (image/video/audio), deletion, and social media link management with real-time URL validation and platform detection.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: A dialog panel component that displays a collapsible list of cities with ratings and travel spots, allowing users to click a spot to focus the map on it.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: An admin UI component for managing a geonames city database, supporting paginated browsing, search, CSV file import, and CRUD operations on city records.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: A reusable heart-based rating component that renders 10 hearts with support for partial fills, hover states, and click-to-rate interactions on a 0–10 scale.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A Three.js-powered 3D interactive globe component with features including country borders, city markers, timezone overlays, solar terminator, and flight path animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: React component that displays journey schedule items as colorful, rotated doodle-style sticky-note cards grouped by date, with a pin decoration and playful Tailwind styling.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: React component that renders journey schedule items in a retro postcard/letter style, grouping items by date into postcard-themed cards with postmark decorations and monospace font.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A dialog component for adding, editing, or deleting a photo associated with a map location, handling file upload, preview, and backend persistence.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: An Internet Identity authentication dialog that handles login/logout flows, displays the user's principal ID, and shows current authentication status.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that displays travel spots, schedule items, and bookmarks as custom markers with popups showing ratings, media galleries, and route overlays. Supports zooming, bookmarking, city filtering, and focused navigation to specific spots or bookmarks.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube/Instagram) for a travel spot. Supports fullscreen viewing, carousel navigation, and lazy-loaded blob-storage URLs.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin UI component for creating, deleting, and managing music albums and their songs, including file upload support for individual and batch audio files. Uses collapsible album cards with per-song playback controls and delete actions.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music collection browser that lists all albums and songs, allowing the user to select a song for playback via a callback. Shows an empty/unauthenticated state when no albums exist or the user is not logged in.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent audio player bar component that plays songs from music albums with play/pause, skip, volume, and seek controls. Supports both externally selected songs and internal playlist navigation, with visibility controlled by layout preferences.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: A React component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data, supporting file upload to an ICP backend canister and IndexedDB caching, with a manual multi-step execution flow for verification.
A dialog panel that lists all journeys with their status (live/upcoming/past) and provides actions to view them on a 2D map or open styled itinerary dialogs (Doodle or Retro).
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: A CRUD management component for travel spots, allowing users to add, edit, delete spots with coordinates and type, and attach media files or social media links per spot.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: A panel that displays bookmarks and travel spots grouped by city and type, with collapsible sections and type-specific icons, supporting focus callbacks for map navigation.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: A settings panel for configuring website layout preferences such as music player visibility, default search place, travel spot display, ripple size, and city font size, with live local time display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and exposing status flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file that defines all data-fetching and mutation hooks for the backend, plus utilities for country name normalization, social media URL validation, and location geocoding via Nominatim.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, music player), and includes utility rules for heading colors on dark vs. bright backgrounds.
frontend/src/lib/journeyUtils.ts: Provides a utility function to generate a unique key for a Journey by combining its city and creation timestamp, ensuring independent schedule data per journey.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Exports a function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year and includes test cases validating results at equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a function that returns all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (with quarter-hour precision) by querying timezone GeoJSON data using the Intl API.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Loads and caches timezone GeoJSON boundary data using IndexedDB and a backend fetch, exposing utilities for timezone detection and local time calculations.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Renders timezone boundaries on a 3D globe using Three.js, supporting quarter-hour UTC offset precision, antimeridian unwrapping, and optional translucent fill meshes for hovered regions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers.
frontend/src/pages/CountryMapExplorer.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map explorer page component that provides location search, toggles between 3D globe and 2D map views, and integrates panels for travelogue, vibes, music, and admin settings.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and helper functions for styling schedule items by day index, including day label generation, color lookup, day index computation, and human-readable date formatting.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Provides utilities to group schedule items by calendar day, sort them chronologically by time, and build per-day route coordinate arrays for map rendering.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a travel journey app, documenting the current architecture, known issue of multiple journeys sharing travelogue entries instead of being scoped by journey ID, and a pending fix request to correct that on the frontend.
